title: Trash Can
description: A simple datapack that lets you create a functional trash can by renaming a hopper minecart to 'Trash' !!
body:
This datapack/mod adds a simple yet powerful trash disposal system to your Minecraft world. By renaming a **Hopper Minecart** to **"Trash"**, it automatically turns into a working **trash can** that clears any unwanted items placed inside. It’s a lightweight and reliable solution for players who want to keep their worlds clean without using complex redstone systems or external mods.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xe7Pe_0TeSM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Features:**
* 🗑️ **Easy to Use:** Simply rename any hopper minecart to “Trash” to convert it into a trash can.
* ⚡ **Automatic Clearing:** Instantly removes any items placed inside, helping reduce clutter (every 10s).
* 💡 **No Commands Needed:** Works seamlessly in survival no setup or extra steps required.
* 🔄 **Performance Friendly:** Optimized to run smoothly without causing lag.
* 🧱 **Compact Design:** Perfect for bases, storage rooms, or automatic farms.

If you notice any missing things or any error related to version, feel free to DM [Planet Minecraft ↗](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/bibekthelegend/)!
